text: Added general CgWorkspace and cgWith with cached immutable-facing views, explicit alias/copy semantics, initial-guess and dimension checks, preconditioner/tolerance parity, and allocation-controlled destination application. New contract suite passes 6/6 on JVM and Scala.js; full Gale core suites pass JVM 509/509 and Scala.js 499/499. ScalaFIM HalfFlow pilot on a periodic 32^3 Helmholtz operator measured stock cg at 964354 ns and 2623291 B/op versus reusable recurrence at 848578 ns and 23 B/op; final pin-side JMH will be repeated after publication.
